title: Singapore Tourism Board Overview
text: The Singapore Tourism Board, also known as STB, is the government agency responsible for supporting and developing Singapore's tourism sector. STB works with industry partners to market Singapore as a destination, improve visitor experiences, and support tourism businesses.

title: STB Destination Marketing
text: STB promotes Singapore internationally through destination branding, marketing campaigns, trade partnerships, and visitor experience initiatives. It works with travel partners, attractions, hotels, airlines, and event organizers.

title: Passion Made Possible
text: Passion Made Possible is Singapore's destination brand. It presents Singapore as a place where visitors can pursue their passions in areas such as food, culture, design, nature, wellness, and business events.

title: Tourism Statistics
text: Tourism statistics are used to understand visitor arrivals, tourism receipts, visitor profiles, hotel performance, and source markets. These metrics help tourism agencies and businesses understand performance and plan future initiatives.

title: Business Events and MICE
text: Singapore promotes itself as a business events destination for meetings, incentives, conferences, and exhibitions. STB supports industry partners to attract high-quality events and strengthen Singapore's position as a global business hub.

title: Sustainable Tourism
text: Sustainable tourism focuses on responsible travel, resource efficiency, community value, and long-term destination resilience. Singapore supports sustainable tourism through greener experiences, industry capability building, and responsible visitor engagement.
